prompt: i want to propose an enhancement: add a --watch flag to the omos-test skill so it reruns tests on file change. open a github issue for oh-my-opencode-slim please.

assertions.name: labels_enhancement
assertions.description: Issue is labeled/typed as enhancement, not bug.

assertions.name: asks_desired_behavior
assertions.description: Skill asks what behavior the user wants (enhancement-specific prompt).

assertions.name: collects_env_and_logs
assertions.description: Output includes environment info and a plugin log section.

assertions.name: asks_confirm_before_submit
assertions.description: Stops and asks user to approve the draft; does NOT run gh issue create.
